description: Preparatory refactoring of legacy code/ directory: fix cross-platform blockers, reduce GUI coupling, replace Win32-specific APIs in domain code, and split oversized files. Operates exclusively on code/. Each story must keep the Windows build (MSVC v143) passing and preserve domain behavior.

userStories.title: Fix include case sensitivity
userStories.description: As a Linux build, I need every #include "..." directive to match the actual filename casing on disk so the project can compile on case-sensitive filesystems.
acceptanceCriteria: Run python3 .claude/skills/include-normalization/fix_includes.py from repo root (use --dry-run first)
Every #include "..." in code/*.h and code/*.cpp matches actual filename casing on disk
A grep/verification pass finds zero remaining case mismatches
Windows build passes

userStories.title: Extract string utilities from gdioutput
userStories.description: As a domain file, I want to use widen/narrow/toUTF8/fromUTF8 without including the GUI header gdioutput.h.
acceptanceCriteria: widen(), narrow(), toUTF8(), fromUTF8() are available as free functions from meos_util.h
gdioutput retains the existing static methods as thin wrappers/using-declarations for backward compatibility
No duplicate definitions of toUTF8 remain (remove old definition from localizer.cpp)
machinecontainer.cpp no longer needs to include gdioutput.h purely for these utilities
Windows build passes (no LNK2005 multiply-defined-symbol errors)

userStories.title: Replace Win32 string functions in domain code
userStories.description: As cross-platform domain code, I want standard C++ replacements for _wtoi, sprintf_s, swprintf_s, _itow_s, _wtoi64.
acceptanceCriteria: Add inline wtoi(const wstring&) to meos_util.h (using wcstol) BEFORE running the script; remove any local wtoi in csvparser.cpp
Run python3 .claude/skills/replace_win32_strings/replace_win32_strings.py code/ (use --dry-run first)
No direct calls to _wtoi, _wtoi64, sprintf_s, swprintf_s, _itow_s in domain .cpp/.h files (Tab*/gdioutput excluded)
Manually fix _wtoi64 in datadefiners.h with std::wcstoll
Windows build passes

userStories.title: Replace Win32 types (DWORD/BOOL) in domain code
userStories.description: As cross-platform domain code, I want DWORD replaced with uint32_t and Win32 BOOL replaced with bool, except where the value is passed to a Win32 API.
acceptanceCriteria: Run python3 .claude/skills/replace_win32_types/replace_win32_types.py (use --dry-run first)
No DWORD or Win32 BOOL usage in domain .cpp/.h files (except inside SQL string literals and variables passed to Win32 APIs)
Variables passed to Win32 APIs (GetComputerName, WideCharToMultiByte, etc.) keep their Win32 types
Add uint32_t overloads to gdioutput::getData where domain callers switched from DWORD
#include <cstdint> added where needed
Windows build passes

userStories.title: Normalize path separators in domain code
userStories.description: As cross-platform domain code, I want hardcoded backslash path separators replaced with portable alternatives.
acceptanceCriteria: Run python3 .claude/skills/normalize_paths/normalize_paths.py (use --dry-run first)
Domain files use std::filesystem::path or forward-slash paths for file construction
Escape sequences (\n, \t) and regex patterns are NOT modified
Windows build passes

userStories.title: US-P0f1: Add callback members to oEvent.h
userStories.description: Infrastructure step: add 13 std::function callback members to oEvent so subsequent stories can route Tab* dependencies through callbacks.
acceptanceCriteria: oEvent.h declares all 13 callback members per .claude/skills/tab-decoupling/SKILL.md (cbBaseButtons, cbKillMachines, cbSetSubSecondMode, cbTimerCallback, cbCheckPrintQueue, cbSyncCallback, cbGetSynchronize, cbGetSynchronizePunches, cbHasReconnectionMachine, cbStartReconnectMachine, cbGetListEditor, cbRemovedList, cbAddCard)
Callbacks are public std::function members with signatures matching SKILL.md
Windows build passes

userStories.title: US-P0f8: Register all Tab callbacks in meos.cpp
userStories.description: Wire all 13 oEvent callbacks during application startup so call sites resolve correctly when the decoupling stories land.
acceptanceCriteria: meos.cpp registers all callbacks on oEvent after Tab objects are constructed
Lambdas capture only what's needed (Tab pointers safe for app lifetime; gdi_main is global)
Static Tab methods (TabList::baseButtons, TabAuto::tabAutoKillMachines, etc.) are invoked with no captures
Windows build passes

userStories.title: US-P0f2: Decouple oEvent.cpp from Tab* includes
userStories.description: Replace direct TabAuto/TabSI/TabList/TabBase usage in oEvent.cpp with the callbacks registered in US-007.
acceptanceCriteria: oEvent.cpp no longer includes TabList.h, TabAuto.h, TabSI.h, or TabBase.h
3 call sites use cbBaseButtons, cbKillMachines, cbSetSubSecondMode (nested classes access via oe.cbXxx)
Add clearTabsCompetitionData() wrapper to gdioutput.h/cpp where needed (FixedTabs is only forward-declared)
Windows build passes

userStories.title: US-P0f3: Decouple autotask.cpp from Tab* includes
userStories.description: Replace TabAuto/TabSI dynamic_casts in autotask.cpp with callbacks.
acceptanceCriteria: autotask.cpp no longer includes TabAuto.h or TabSI.h
dynamic_casts replaced with cbTimerCallback, cbCheckPrintQueue, cbSyncCallback, cbGetSynchronize, cbGetSynchronizePunches
Windows build passes

userStories.title: US-P0f4: Decouple oEventSQL.cpp from TabAuto
userStories.description: Remove TabAuto include from oEventSQL.cpp and abstract MySQLReconnect creation via callback.
acceptanceCriteria: oEventSQL.cpp no longer includes TabAuto.h
Uses cbHasReconnectionMachine and cbStartReconnectMachine
Add #include "localizer.h" directly (previously transitive via TabAuto.h)
Forward-declare isThreadReconnecting() locally
Windows build passes

userStories.title: US-P0f5: Decouple oEventResult.cpp from TabBase/TabList
userStories.description: Replace dynamic_cast in oEventResult.cpp with callback.
acceptanceCriteria: oEventResult.cpp no longer includes TabBase.h or TabList.h
dynamic_cast replaced with cbGetListEditor
Windows build passes

userStories.title: US-P0f6: Decouple metalist.cpp from TabAuto
userStories.description: Replace cast in metalist.cpp with cbRemovedList callback.
acceptanceCriteria: metalist.cpp no longer includes TabAuto.h
Uses cbRemovedList
Windows build passes

userStories.title: US-P0f7: Decouple onlineinput.cpp from TabSI
userStories.description: Replace static TabSI call in onlineinput.cpp with cbAddCard callback.
acceptanceCriteria: onlineinput.cpp no longer includes TabSI.h
Uses cbAddCard
Windows build passes

userStories.title: Replace Win32 time APIs with std::chrono
userStories.description: As cross-platform domain code, I want GetLocalTime, SYSTEMTIME, GetTickCount64, FileTimeToLocalFileTime, SystemTimeToFileTime replaced with std::chrono / <ctime> equivalents.
acceptanceCriteria: Add meos_steady_clock_ms() and meos_localtime_now() helpers to meos_util.h per .claude/skills/replace_time_apis/SKILL.md
Run python3 .claude/skills/replace_time_apis/replace_time_apis.py (use --dry-run first)
No GetLocalTime, SYSTEMTIME, GetTickCount64, FileTimeToLocalFileTime, SystemTimeToFileTime in domain .cpp/.h files
Fix write-context bugs (st.tm_year = value - 1900, st.tm_mon = value - 1) in TimeStamp.cpp, meos_util.cpp, oEventSpeaker.cpp
Remove invalid `0 /* TODO */ = expr` wMilliseconds assignments
Update UI callers (TabCompetition.cpp ~1308-1326, ~2975-2978) to pass std::tm to changed domain signatures
Windows build passes

userStories.title: Replace Win32 file APIs with std::filesystem
userStories.description: As cross-platform domain code, I want FindFirstFile/FindNextFile, GetTempPath, CreateDirectory, DeleteFile, _wfopen_s, _waccess, MAX_PATH replaced with std::filesystem and <fstream>.
acceptanceCriteria: Run python3 .claude/skills/replace_file_apis/replace_file_apis.py (use --dry-run first)
Manually fix script bug: std::filesystem::remove(x.c_str(, ec)) → { std::error_code ec; std::filesystem::remove(x, ec); }
No FindFirstFile, FindNextFile, WIN32_FIND_DATA, GetTempPath, CreateDirectory, DeleteFile, _wfopen_s, _waccess in domain files
No MAX_PATH/_MAX_PATH usage in domain files (grep manually after script)
Implement matchWildcard for *.bu? and *.dbmeos* patterns in enumerateBackups()
file_time_type → time_t uses two-clocks workaround
Windows build passes

userStories.title: Replace Win32 threading with std::thread/std::mutex
userStories.description: As cross-platform domain code, I want CRITICAL_SECTION, _beginthread(ex), TerminateThread replaced with std::mutex, std::thread, and cooperative cancellation.
acceptanceCriteria: No CRITICAL_SECTION, EnterCriticalSection, LeaveCriticalSection, InitializeCriticalSection, DeleteCriticalSection in domain .cpp/.h files
No _beginthread, _beginthreadex, TerminateThread in domain .cpp/.h files (excluding vendored code/mysql/)
MySQLReconnect has user-defined copy constructor (std::thread not copyable)
Download uses std::atomic<bool> threadRunning as completion flag
Replace ThreadHandle boolean checks with ThreadHandle.joinable()
socket.cpp uses std::thread(...).detach() for fire-and-forget
Windows build passes

userStories.title: Replace Sleep() with std::this_thread::sleep_for
userStories.description: Mechanical replacement of Win32 Sleep(N) with std::this_thread::sleep_for(std::chrono::milliseconds(N)) in domain code.
acceptanceCriteria: Run python3 .claude/skills/sleep-replacement/fix_sleep.py (use --dry-run first)
No Win32 Sleep() calls in domain .cpp/.h files
<thread> and <chrono> includes added where needed
Millisecond values preserved verbatim (especially in SportIdent.cpp serial loops)
Windows build passes

userStories.title: Replace std::exception("msg") with std::runtime_error
userStories.description: Replace MSVC-specific std::exception(const char*) with std::runtime_error throughout domain code.
acceptanceCriteria: All `throw std::exception("...")` replaced with `throw std::runtime_error("...")` in domain files
meosException inherits from std::runtime_error
All existing catch (std::exception&) blocks still function
Windows build passes

userStories.title: Replace MessageBox/OutputDebugString in domain code
userStories.description: Replace direct Win32 UI calls in domain code with exceptions, callbacks, or std::cerr.
acceptanceCriteria: Run python3 .claude/skills/replace_msgbox_debug/replace_msgbox_debug.py (use --dry-run first)
No active MessageBox() calls in domain .cpp/.h files (most already commented out)
No active OutputDebugString/OutputDebugStringA/OutputDebugStringW calls in domain .cpp/.h files
OutputDebugString replacements use std::cerr (with narrow() for wide strings)
Block-comment-aware scan confirms zero active calls
Windows build passes

userStories.title: StringCache + Localizer translate() use thread_local
userStories.description: Replace GetCurrentThreadId() with thread_local in StringCache::getInstance() and translate()'s static buffer.
acceptanceCriteria: StringCache::getInstance() uses `thread_local static StringCache instance; return instance;`
translate()'s static index and value buffer are thread_local
No GetCurrentThreadId() in meos_util.h/cpp
Windows build passes

userStories.title: Add public accessors needed for migration
userStories.description: Add public accessor methods and promote fields needed for repositories, tests, and cross-entity logic.
acceptanceCriteria: oPunch::isUsed, tIndex, tMatchControlId are public
oClass has `int getNumLegs() const { return (int)legInfo.size(); }`
oAbstractRunner::tInTeam, tLeg, tStartTime are public
oAbstractRunner has `const TempResult& getTempResult() const`
oTeam has `wstring getRunnerIdString() const` public wrapper
oCard has `void setCardNo(int)` if missing
All entities with oData buffers expose `const BYTE* getOData() const` and `static int getODataBlobSize()` in public sections
Windows build passes

userStories.title: alignas + dynamic dataSize on oData buffers
userStories.description: Add alignas(sizeof(wchar_t)) to oData buffers and make dataSize use sizeof(wchar_t)-based formulas. No-op on Windows.
acceptanceCriteria: alignas(sizeof(wchar_t)) added to oData and oDataOld arrays in oClass.h, oClub.h, oCourse.h, oControl.h, oRunner.h (and oTeam.h if applicable)
dataSize constants use sizeof(wchar_t)-based formulas (e.g. `256 * static_cast<int>(sizeof(wchar_t)) + 64`) that evaluate to the legacy value on Windows
oCard skipped (no oData buffer)
Windows build passes with identical binary layout

userStories.title: Header hygiene: missing includes + StdAfx removal
userStories.description: Audit headers for PCH-dependent implicit includes, remove StdAfx.h from standalone headers, fix invalid enum forward declarations.
acceptanceCriteria: intkeymap.hpp no longer includes StdAfx.h
Other .hpp files audited for unnecessary StdAfx.h includes
oTeam.h includes <set> explicitly
Domain .cpp files include oDataContainer.h directly where getDI()/getDCI() is used
oClass.cpp includes xmlparser.h and timeconstants.hpp explicitly
`enum KeyCommandCode : int;` (with underlying type) in TableType.h
Windows build passes

userStories.title: Replace CompareString (Win32) with standard wstring comparison
userStories.description: Replace Win32 CompareString API with standard `wstring <` comparison in domain code.
acceptanceCriteria: No CompareString calls in domain .cpp/.h files
GeneralResultInfo::compareResult and oAbstractRunner::compareClubs use standard < comparison
Windows build passes

userStories.title: Misc: SQL_quote, oListParam, permute()
userStories.description: Three small fixes that each reduce migration friction.
acceptanceCriteria: SQL_quote() uses toUTF8() from meos_util.h instead of WideCharToMultiByte (depends on US-002)
oListParam in oListInfo.h/cpp has `set<int> selection`, `bool lockUpdate` (default false), and `filterInclude()` implementation
permute() in random.h/cpp uses std::shuffle with std::random_device + std::mt19937
Windows build passes

userStories.title: Move enums out of oEvent.h
userStories.description: Move enums that don't belong to oEvent (SpecialPunch, RunnerStatus, DynamicRunnerStatus, SortOrder) into more appropriate headers; keep backward-compat using-declarations in oEvent.h.
acceptanceCriteria: SpecialPunch moved to oControl.h (or a shared enum header)
RunnerStatus, DynamicRunnerStatus, SortOrder, isPossibleResultStatus moved to oAbstractRunner.h
oEvent.h retains using/typedef declarations so existing includers compile unchanged
Windows build passes

userStories.title: Extract oAbstractRunner to its own header
userStories.description: Extract the oRunner/oTeam base class from oRunner.h into oAbstractRunner.h, forward-declaring oEvent to break the circular dependency.
acceptanceCriteria: New file code/oAbstractRunner.h contains the base class and only forward-declares oEvent
oRunner.h includes oAbstractRunner.h instead of defining the base class inline
oTeam.h includes oAbstractRunner.h
DynamicValue methods referencing oEvent::dataRevision live in .cpp files, not inline
Circular dependency between oRunner.h and oEvent.h is broken
Windows build passes

userStories.title: Remove vendored third-party directories
userStories.description: After vcpkg migrations land (prd-legacy-build.md US-P0m*), remove vendored libraries and pre-built libs from code/. SKIP this story if those vcpkg stories are not complete.
acceptanceCriteria: Verify all US-P0m* stories in prd-legacy-build.md are complete and CI is green — if not, mark this story blocked
code/libharu/, code/mysql/, code/png/, code/minizip/, code/restbed/ removed
Pre-built libs (libharu.lib, libhpdf.lib, RestBed.lib, zlib libs) removed from code/lib64*, code/lib/
Runtime DLLs removed from code/dll/, code/dll64/
No source file references vendored include paths after deletion
Windows build and CI pass
